description: Architecture for multi-LLM skill execution platform

input.input_text: Design architecture for audhd-agents: 51 skills, 3 LLM providers (GPT, Gemini), per-skill model routing, prompt adaptation layer, cost tracking. Solo developer, needs to scale to team later.
input.constraints: Python, GCP preferred, budget under $500/month at current usage

description: API backend for certification progress tracker

input.input_text: REST API for certification progress tracking: user profiles, certification records, learning path recommendations, exam scheduling integration. Need to support 50K concurrent users.
